_meta.purpose: Public-response-shape SoT after the ADDITIVE referral arm. Supersedes scan-trade-calls-shape-snapshot-2026-06-20.json. ADDITIVE-ONLY: success `_algovault` MAY gain `upgrade_hint` (the trigger-(b) multi-hit-scan referral line, KEYED) + `referral_hint` (structured, allow-listed); the quota_exhausted envelope gains a top-level `referral_hint` (from:'limit') and its `message` is referral-prominent. NO existing field removed/renamed. outcome_* must NEVER appear.

algovault_referral_additive_keys._algovault.upgrade_hint: NEW optional string — the trigger-(b) multi-hit-scan referral line for a KEYED user when eligible_non_hold >= 3 (SCAN_REFERRAL_MIN_HITS). ≤1 aha referral/session, shared with get_trade_call (shouldShowAhaReferral). Absent otherwise.
algovault_referral_additive_keys._algovault.referral_hint: NEW additive, allow-listed structured object {cta, link_or_path, bonus_calls, from:'aha_scan'} — present only when trigger (b) fired.

new_in_this_wave.trigger_b: REFERRAL-INPRODUCT-NUDGE-W1 (b): a multi-hit scan (eligible_non_hold >= 3) by a KEYED user attaches the aha_scan referral line to _algovault.upgrade_hint + the structured _algovault.referral_hint. Capped to ≤1 aha referral/session via the single-source aha store (shared with get_trade_call).
new_in_this_wave.limit_moment: The quota_exhausted envelope is now the scan WALL: message is referral-prominent + upgrade-retained (state-adaptive keyed/keyless) and carries a top-level referral_hint {…, from:'limit'}.
new_in_this_wave.referral_hint.bonus_calls: INTEGER from REFERRAL_TERMS SoT (BONUS_CALLS = 500). Never hardcoded.
new_in_this_wave.message_only: No quota/gating change (charge stays max(1, eligible_non_hold)). tools/list=9 byte-unchanged.

error_contract.quota_exhausted: {error:'quota_exhausted', code:'tier_limit_reached', message, quota:{used,total,remaining}, suggested_action, referral_hint:{cta,link_or_path,bonus_calls,from:'limit'}, _algovault:{tool,version,session_id}} — referral_hint is NEW additive; message is referral-prominent. NO _receipts on this envelope.

additive_only_rule: top level (error) + _algovault (success) may GAIN referral_hint/upgrade_hint but never LOSE/RENAME any pre-existing key; calls[] item shape unchanged; content[0] stays the JSON envelope. A forbidden_key under referral_hint, >4 referral_hint keys, or a hardcoded bonus number = Data Integrity/Factuality violation → HALT.
drift_check_command: cd ~/code/crypto-quant-signal-mcp && npx vitest run scan-trade-calls nudge-copy   # trigger-(b) fires at >=3 non-HOLD (keyed+session), ≤1/session cap, limit-moment referral_hint, allow-listed 4 keys, no outcome_*
consumers: MCP agent callers (Claude/Cursor/ChatGPT) via tools/call — read the upgrade_hint string + structured referral_hint
future P2 landing scanner card — consumes the same envelope shape
